rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 3/10 with identical reasoning rooted entirely in job-relevant skill gaps (no C for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification, no MACsec/802.1X security exposure, no Japanese proficiency). The differences between the two are purely reworded phrasings of the same concerns and strengths, with no penalty, new concern, or shifted reasoning tied to the change of locations from Western cities to India. The demographic signal had no effect on the outcome.
